channel.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
REST and API

  • 🍓 MixerApi - Streamline development of modern RESTful APIs for your teams CakePHP project.

    • Development Environment

  • 🍓 Galley - A small Docker dev environment for CakePHP development which includes a simple command line utility.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Icings/Partitionable pluginstars3 - Partitionable associations allowing for basic limiting per group.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 17th - May 23rd, 2021
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 OPCache Preloaderstars6 - An OPCache Preloader for CakePHP 4.x applications.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Development Environment

  • Devilbox - A docker development environment for (CakePHP) apps to be auto-setup including a lot of tools.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 ADmad/SocialAuth pluginstars43 - A plugin which allows you to authenticate using social providers like Facebook/Google/Twitter etc. using SocialConnect/authstars459 social sign on library.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Development Environment

  • 🍓 CakePHP Dockerstars5 - A cakephp/app template for docker and kubernetes setup.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021
item.description:
Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 ADmad/JwtAuth pluginstars157 - A plugin for authenticating using JSON Web Tokens.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Robotusers/TableInheritance pluginstars5 - Singe Table Inheritance (STI) plugin.

    • Search

  • 🍓 Cake/ElasticSearch pluginstars86 - Alternative ORM using Elasticsearch as its backend.

    • Security

  • 🍓 Recaptcha pluginstars18 - Simple, lightweight Google Recaptcha v2.

    • Templating

  • 🍓 TwigView pluginstars11 - A plugin to use the Twig Templating Language for views.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Debugging

  • AssociationsDebugger pluginstars3 - A plugin that draws your model associations as diagram.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
REST and API

  • 🍓 FractalTransformerView pluginstars13 - A plugin which allows using Fractal transformers for your API output.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Debugging

  • 🍓 CakephpWhoops pluginstars13 - PHP errors and exceptions for cool kids with filp/whoopsstars12.4k.

    • Auditing / Logging

  • 🍓 AuditStash pluginstars67 - Flexible and rock solid audit log tracking.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Skeleton

  • 🍓 MixerApi/Bakestars2 - Bake theme for generating RESTful controllers.

    • Migration

  • 🍓 Upgrade app (extended)stars20 - An extended upgrade app for 2.x=>3.x, between 3.x and some 4.x snippets.

    • E-commerce

  • PaypalWPP pluginstars2 - For communicating with Paypal Web Payments Pro for transactions and information about your account.

    • APM

  • NewRelic pluginstars7 - A simple plugin that enables just name transaction and browser timing using the New Relic PHP agent.

    • Miscellaneous

  • OrcaServices/Heartbeat pluginstars5 - Monitor the hearbeat of your application (e.g. whether the database is available and up-to-date).

    • Development Environment

  • NetBeansstars43 - This package provides support for CakePHP in NetBeans 8.1+.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 Acl pluginstars113 - Managing ACL as database approach.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Itosho/EasyQuery pluginstars22 - Behavior for easily generating some complicated queries like (bulk) insert/upsert etc.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Inertia pluginstars13 - Server side adapter for Inertia.js.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2020
item.description:
Skeleton

  • 🍓 App templatestars307 - An empty CakePHP project for use with composer.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Asset Management

  • 🍓 AssetMix pluginstars17 - Provides integration with Laravel Mix asset compilation.

    • Debugging

  • 🍓 Sentry pluginstars27 A plugin to seamlessly integrate Sentry with CakePHP for errors and exceptions.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Testing

  • 🍓 CakephpFixtureFactories pluginstars41 - Create your fixtures dynamically on a test basis, accelerate the writing and maintainance of your tests.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Queue

  • 🍓 CakeQueuesadilla pluginstars32 - A plugin that provides queueing integration with a variety of backends (BeanstalkD, MySQL, Redis, etc.).

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
REST and API

  • 🍓 SwaggerBake pluginstars23 - This plugin automatically builds your Swagger UI documentation from your existing models and routes. A redoc option is also available.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
File Manipulation

  • 🍓 Josegonzalez/Upload pluginstars544 - A customisable plugin that uses Flysystem to write to multiple backends (Dropbox, FTP, S3, Local, etc.).

    • Email

  • 🍓 EmailQueue pluginstars56 - Email queue plugin with a preview and sender shell.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Connehito/CakephpMasterReplica pluginstars12 - Switch master/replica database connections.

    • Debugging

  • 🍓 Execution orderstars21 - A demo app to display the execution order of files, methods and callbacks.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 30th - Apr 5th, 2020
item.description:
I18n

  • 🍓 Cake/Localized pluginstars210 - Localized validation and ready-to-use translation PO files.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2020
item.description:
HTTP

  • 🍓 Http/Adapter/Cake librarystars3 - Adapter for HTTPlugstars2.2k HTTP client abstraction.

    • Geolocation

  • 🍓 Geo pluginstars44 - Containing Geocoder behavior and GoogleMaps helper.

    • Architecture

  • 🍓 Burzum/CakeServiceLayer pluginstars50 - Service layer and domain/business model implementation.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Security

  • 🍓 Muffin/Obfuscate pluginstars32 - Primary key obfuscation/shortening using UUIDs, HashIds, Optimus, Tiny and/or custom obfuscation strategies.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 9th - Mar 15th, 2020
item.description:
Markup

  • 🍓 Markup pluginstars1 - Allows to use PHP or JS based syntax highlighting.

    • Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 Setup:Maintenance - Maintenance shell to go into maintenance mode for all requests with optional IP whitelisting.

    • Social

  • 🍓 Ratings pluginstars7 - Allows users to rate records and displays ratings.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Security

  • 🍓 Expose pluginstars7 - Expose entities through additional UUIDs instead of their AIID primary keys to obfuscate those IDs and data associated with these numerically ordered values.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
REST and API

  • 🍓 Alt3/Swagger pluginstars56 - Swagger 2.0 documentation for your CakePHP APIs using swagger-php and swagger-ui.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020
item.description:
File Manipulation

  • 🍓 FileStorage pluginstars203 - Abstract file storage and upload plugin.

    • Search

  • 🍓 PlumSearch pluginstars20 - Search plugin implements custom, flexible and extendable search strategies. Implements PRG pattern.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 RowLocker pluginstars19 - Exclusive locks for rows in your tables.

    • Security

  • 🍓 Bruteforcestars3 - Simple way to add Brute Force Protection to your installation without involving database.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Lampager/Cake pluginstars4 - Rapid pagination without using OFFSET.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 TwoFactorAuth pluginstars31 - Allows two factor authentication using Google Authenticator or similar app to generate one-time codes. Based on RobThree/TwoFactorAuthstars738 library.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Third Party APIs

  • CloudflareDeploy Pluginstars1 - Useful console commands for deploying CakePHP apps using Cloudflare.

    • REST and API

  • 🍓 CakeDC/Api pluginstars54 - All-in-one solution to provide a complete API. It includes versioning, renderers, CRUD, authentication, extensions (paginate, filter, HATEOAS), and much more.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Muffin/Trash pluginstars75 - Soft-delete behavior for CakePHP.

    • Migration

  • 🍓 Migrations pluginstars113 - (DB) Migration plugin.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 Muffin/Tokenize pluginstars11 - Event driven behavior for easily generating single-use security tokens.
  • 🍓 CakeDC/Users pluginstars490 - Complete user management (admin panel, remember me, etc), Social login (FB, Twitter, LinkedIn, Google, Instagram), RBAC, API and more.

    • Auditing / Logging

  • 🍓 Muffin/Footprint pluginstars81 - Plugin to allow passing currently logged in user to model layer.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 20th - Jan 26th, 2020
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 Muffin/Sti pluginstars6 - Single Table Inheritance for CakePHP.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Search

  • 🍓 Tags pluginstars10 - For tagging and finding tagged records.

    • Caching

  • 🍓 Cache pluginstars26 - For caching views (HTML, CSV, JSON, XML, ...) as static cache files.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 Tools:Passwordablestars325 - Containing Passwordable behavior for a DRY approach on password hashing.

    • Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 Tools pluginstars325 - Containing lots of useful libs, helpers, behaviors, components, shells and more.

    • SEO

  • 🍓 Tools:Sluggedstars325 - Containing Slugged behavior to auto-generate URL-compatible slugs from titles.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 6th - Jan 12th, 2020
item.description:
Skeleton

  • 🍓 Crud pluginstars343 - CakePHP Application development on steroids - rapid prototyping / scaffolding & production ready code.

    • Debugging

  • 🍓 DebugKit pluginstars859 - The de-facto standard for debugging.

    • Security

  • 🍓 Captcha pluginstars5 - Simple, unobstrusive and extendable captcha solution providing by default an image based math captcha.

    • Templating

  • 🍓 Meta pluginstars6 - Makes handling meta tags and SEO relevant HTML markup DRY and easy.

    • Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 Ajax pluginstars51 - A plugin to ease handling AJAX requests.
  • 🍓 CakeImpersonate pluginstars6 - A component that stores the current authentication session and creates new session for impersonating Users. User can revert back to original authentication sessions without the need to re-login.

    • Email

  • 🍓 Mailgun pluginstars21 - Email transport plugin for sending email via Mailgun.

    • File Manipulation

  • Xety/Cake3Upload pluginstars25 - A little plugin to upload file.

    • Search

  • 🍓 Search pluginstars152 - Provides easy searching/filtering for paginated views using PRG pattern.

    • Navigation

  • 🍓 Icings/Menu pluginstars9 - A KnpMenustars1.2k seasoned menu plugin for CakePHP.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 Feedback pluginstars4 - Allow visitors to send quick and easy feedback incl. a screenshot via sidebar form.
  • 🍓 Calendar pluginstars11 - For generating basic calendars. Includes IcalView for ICS calendar file generation.

    • Templating

  • 🍓 Feed pluginstars13 - Containing an RssView class to easily generate (complex) RSS feeds.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 CakeDecimal pluginstars3 - A value object approach on handling decimals.

    • Debugging

  • 🍓 Setup pluginstars34 - A lightweight setup plugin containing debugging and maintenance tools.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • 🍓 CakeDto pluginstars17 - Quickly generate useful data transfer objects for your app (mutable/immutable), replacing messy arrays and leveraging your IDE through typehinting and autocomplete.
  • 🍓 Shim pluginstars37 - A plugin containing useful shims and improvements as basis for your application.
  • 🍓 Flash pluginstars9 - More powerful flash messages for your application.

    • Auditing / Logging

  • 🍓 DatabaseLog pluginstars41 - Simple and stand-alone logging to database instead of files.

    • Code Analysis

  • 🍓 TestHelper pluginstars6 - Provides testing enhancements and TDD support as browser backend.
  • 🍓 IdeHelper pluginstars140 - Helps to make IDE support better by adding annotations to your existing code similar to what baking does to new code.

    • Migration

  • 🍓 Upgrade appstars94 - Official upgrade app for 2.x=>3.x and 3.x=>4.x.

    • File Manipulation

  • 🍓 Josbeir/Filesystem pluginstars14 - Abstract Flysystem + file entity based upload plugin.

    • Queue

  • 🍓 Queue pluginstars262 - A minimal and dependency-free queue solution.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • 🍓 TinyAuth pluginstars115 - Authentication and role based (single/multi) authorization as very light-weight approach.
  • 🍓 Authentication pluginstars82 - Official CakePHP authentication middleware plugin.
  • 🍓 Authorization pluginstars51 - Official CakePHP authorization stack.

    • Asset Management

  • 🍓 AssetCompress pluginstars371 - A complete asset manager for CakePHP.

    • I18n

  • 🍓 ADmad/I18n pluginstars40 - A plugin with I18n related tools.
  • 🍓 ShadowTranslate pluginstars42 - A plugin with shadow table based replacement for core's Translate behavior.

    • Imagery

  • 🍓 ADmad/Glide pluginstars34 - A plugin for using Glide image manipulation library.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • 🍓 ADmad/Sequence pluginstars37 - Behavior for maintaining ordered list of records.
  • 🍓 Duplicatable pluginstars43 - Behavior for duplicating entities including related data.
  • 🍓 Muffin/Orderly pluginstars21 - Allows setting default order for your tables.
  • 🍓 Muffin/Webservices ORM pluginstars79 - An ORM like interface for webservices.

    • PDF

  • 🍓 CakePdf pluginstars364 - A plugin around PDF generation.

    • Security

  • 🍓 Muffin/Throttle pluginstars58 - A plugin for rate limiting (API) requests.

    • SEO

  • 🍓 Muffin/Slug pluginstars31 - A plugin for generating slugs and finding records by slug. Uses a pluggable architecture which allows using your own slug generator class.

    • Templating

  • 🍓 Bake pluginstars86 - Provides code generation functionality.
  • 🍓 BootstrapUI pluginstars297 - Bootstrap 3 integration.
  • 🍓 CsvView pluginstars174 - A view class to easily generate CSV.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 2nd - Dec 8th, 2019
item.description:
Security

  • BryanCrowe/EncryptedTypestars7 - Simple solution that enables Encrypted data types to be stored in the database.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Libs

  • Jenkins - The free alternative for private (GitHub) repos.

    • Markup

  • Gourmet/CommonMark pluginstars10 - Adds CommonMark Markdown parsing.

    • Migration

  • Upgrade/Migration Guide - Official migration guide.

    • REST and API

  • CrudJsonApi pluginstars47 - Crud listener for building JSON API compliant APIs.

    • Templating

  • CommonMark pluginstars10 - Adds CommonMark (markdown) support to models and views.

    • Testing

  • CakePHP Codeception modulestars46 - The official CakePHP integration with Codeception.

    • Demo

  • Sandbox - A sandbox CakePHP application with lots of demos and plugin showcasings.

    • Help

  • Official CakePHP Forum - This is for generic questions and alike.
  • IRC Channel - Live chat/discussion with other devs and core devs.
  • stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/cakephp - This is for specific questions, ideally along with some example code.

    • CakePHP Websites

  • dereuromark.de - An extensive CakePHP core dev blog.

    • CakePHP Tutorials

  • Official Blog tutorial

    • CakePHP Reading and Listening

  • CakePHP Cookbook(!) - The official CakePHP documentation.

    • Official

  • cakefest.org - Annual CakePHP Conference.

    • MeetUps

  • CakePHP-DE - MeetUps in Germany.

    • Third Party APIs

  • Jira pluginstars2 - Provides a helper to allow access to Jira's REST API using lesstif/php-jira-rest-clientstars394 as the Vendor. Currently read-only access.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • Fetchable pluginstars0 - Behavior for fetching entities from cache / memory.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
APM

  • NewRelic plugin - A complete plugin that enables full New Relic integration for a CakePHP application, including CLI naming, exceptions sending, custom timings, etc.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Security

  • StopSpam pluginstars1 - A plugin that allows you to check if a username, email address or IP address has been reported as a spammer.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 13th - May 19th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • CakeDC/Enum pluginstars27 - A plugin to add enumeration list support to your app.
  • LinkScannerstars1 - A plugin for recursively scanning links.

    • Testing

  • FriendsOfCake/Fixturize pluginstars23 - More efficient inserting fixtures when running test suites by decreasing amount of inserts (mysql only).

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 22nd - Apr 28th, 2019
item.description:
Demo

  • Vue.js Demo Appstars33 - A CakePHP + VueJS single page application skeleton.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Email

  • SendGrid pluginstars5 - Email transport plugin for sending email via SendGrid API.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Email

  • Elastic Email pluginstars4 - Email transport plugin for sending email via Elastic Email API.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • Lqdt/OrmJson pluginstars7 - Behavior and Trait for selecting, finding, getting and setting properties and values inside JSON type fields through CakePHP ORM.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 9th - Jul 15th, 2018
item.description:
Templating

  • Datalist pluginstars4 - Support for HTML5 datalist element with the possibility to create new entries into associated models.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
Asset Management

  • Assets pluginstars3 - Dynamic and "on the fly" asset files.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 16th - Apr 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Imagery

  • HtmlToImageView pluginstars1 - Render HTML view as image (jpg or png) using wkhtmltoimage.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 26th - Mar 4th, 2018
item.description:
CMS and applications built on CakePHP

  • Croogo - CMS software

    • Demo

  • Croogo 3.x - Croogo 3.x demo

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • CakeDC/NavAuth pluginstars9 - A plugin for authenticating against Navision® service using SOAP or OData services. It includes NTLM authentication and more.

    • Social

  • CakeDC/Forum pluginstars23 - Forum plugin including categories, threads and replies, reporting messages, moderators, admin interface and more.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 15th - Jan 21st, 2018
item.description:
Development Environment

  • Ovenstars136 - Setup your favorite framework with 1 file and 1 click.
  • Mixerstars42 - A plugin to discover and manage CakePHP plugins.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • TokenVerify pluginstars9 - Easily issue tokens that can be used for mail authentication.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 24th - Jul 30th, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Robotusers/Tactician pluginstars8 - Tools for Tactician command bus integration.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 17th - Jul 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • ActionsClass pluginstars13 - Gives you the ability to manage your Controller actions as single classes.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 10th - Jul 16th, 2017
item.description:
Security

  • Recaptcha Mailhide pluginstars1 - A plugin that allows you to hide email addresses using reCAPTCHA.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 26th - Jul 2nd, 2017
item.description:
File Manipulation

  • Image pluginstars19 - Image behavior that works much like Cake's built in TranslateBehavior.

    • Miscellaneous

  • DatabaseBackup pluginstars15 - A plugin to export, import and manage database backups.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Demo

  • BlogMVCstars6 - A simple Blog example with CakePHP based on BlogMVC Projectstars213.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Demo

  • RealWorldstars103 - Example CakePHP codebase containing real world examples (CRUD, auth, advanced patterns and more) that adheres to the RealWorldstars57.8k spec and API.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 24th - Apr 30th, 2017
item.description:
I18n

  • Translate pluginstars17 - Manage translations of your static content the easy way via web backend, incl. import from POT files, auto-suggest and auto-translate via API.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 17th - Apr 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Notifications

  • ker0x/CakeGcm pluginstars9 - A plugin to send downstream messages to an Android or iOS device through Google Cloud Messaging.
  • ker0x/Push pluginstars16 - A plugin to send push notifications through services like Firebase Cloud Messaging.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • Serializeable Data Types pluginstars2 - Serialize DB content as JSON or using phps serializing functions.

    • Development Environment

  • Dockerstars29 - CakePHP in a docker container environment.

    • Miscellaneous

  • CakeMiddlewaresstars4 - A collection of Cakephp Middlewares.
  • Comments pluginstars7 - A fully customizable Comments plugin.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
REST and API

  • Cors pluginstars37 - Activate CORS with Middleware.
  • Cors pluginstars19 - A lightweight plugin for adding CORS headers to specified endpoints.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • Robotusers/Excel pluginstars20 - ORM wrapper for PHPExcel.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Debugging

  • Psa/FixtureCheck pluginstars2 - A plugin to help detect mismatches in live DB and fixtures in order to make fixture based tests more reliable and deployments safer.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Templating

  • InlineCss pluginstars8 - A plugin to convert HTML style blocks to inline CSS on a View template (intended for use with email templates).

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 9th - Jan 15th, 2017
item.description:
Debugging

  • ErrorEmail pluginstars16 - A plugin to email exception/error information to your dev team.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Interval pluginstars1 - Converts seconds to human readable string (string to seconds), uses business hours (1 week = 5 days, 1 day = 8 hours).

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Testing

  • Fixtures pluginstars2 - Fixtures plugin to read existing fixtures and create table/insert data for quick start with app.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 12th - Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
Demo

  • Xetastars56 - A resource to help people starting with CakePHP.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Imagery

  • Thumber pluginstars7 - A plugin to create thumbnails using intervention/imagestars11.9k.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Environment

  • Environments pluginstars46 - Plugin to handle environments.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Sep 12th - Sep 18th, 2016
item.description:
NoSQL

  • Monga pluginstars18 - Provides access to MongoDB datasource using thephpleague/monga.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Templating

  • CakeExcel pluginstars21 - An Excel view to generate XLSX files.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Development Environment

  • CakePHP Vagrant Setupstars5 - Tool for spinning up multiple CakePHP 3.x Vanilla Dev Environments.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
REST and API

  • Alt3/ValidationExposer pluginstars9 - Easily expose your application's validation rules.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
REST and API

  • ApiPagination pluginstars37 - Injects pagination information from CakePHP's Paginator into serialized JsonView and XmlView responses.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Development Environment

  • PhpStorm pluginstars6 - CakePHP auto-completion support for console commands in PhpStorm IDE.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 14th - Mar 20th, 2016
item.description:
Email

  • Gourmet/Email pluginstars17 - Email helper, layout and more.

    • ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • JeremyHarris/LazyLoad pluginstars62 - An association lazy loader for entities.

    • Queue

  • Gearman pluginstars13 - A plugin for offloading CakePHP tasks to a Gearman Job Server.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Dependency Injection

  • PimpleDi pluginstars13 Allows dependency injection based on Pimple library.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Third Party APIs

  • Twitter pluginstars19 - Allows access to the Twitter REST and streaming APIs using the Webservicestars79 ORM.
  • GitHub pluginstars8 - Allows access to the GitHub REST APIs using the Webservicestars79 ORM.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
Filtering and Validation

  • HtmlPurifier pluginstars43 - Purifier Plugin that features a trait, behavior and helper to allow you to get sanitization and filtering where you need it. You can configure multiple sets of filter rules as well.

    • Templating

  • JadeView pluginstars0 - Jade template engine plugin.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • CakeAdmin pluginstars28 - A non-stable user management plugin with a built-in admin area.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2016
item.description:
Environment

  • Gourmet/Aroma pluginstars14 - Database based configuration.

    • Testing

  • Gourmet/Muffin pluginstars2 - FactoryMuffinstars515 support for CakePHP fixture records.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2016
item.description:
Search

  • SphinxSearch pluginstars3 - Basic behaviour implementation for querying SphinxSearch indexes.

    • Third Party APIs

  • Salesforce pluginstars7 - Allows use of CakePHP's ORM to Query and Interact with Salesforce Enterprise Instances.
  • CakeTmdb pluginstars4 - The Movie Database (TMDB) API integration.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2015
item.description:
Libs

  • YamlRoutestars6 - Configure routes with simple YAML files.

    • SEO

  • Seo pluginstars7 - Auto-creates and manages your SEO tags.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2015
item.description:
Demo

  • CakeFest - Demo application around the annual CakePHP Conference "CakeFest".

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2015
item.description:
I18n

  • Translation pluginstars4 - Extract pot files, translate string (manually, google, community), export translations to pot files.
  • Transifex pluginstars14 - Managing i18n PO files and translations via Transifex API.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Dashboard pluginstars19 - Build beautiful dashboards for your cakes.
  • CurrencyConverter pluginstars8 - A plugin to convert currency into another one.
  • UserTools pluginstars41 - User tools for login, registration, password reset and more. Works out of the box CRUD like and is highly configurable.
  • Utils pluginstars32 - Containing useful components (Authorizer, Menu) and behaviors (WhoDidIt, Uploadable, Metas, Stateable).
  • Wrench pluginstars27 - Maintenance Mode plugin. Easily extensible and customizable.
  • Yaml pluginstars11 - For using YAML config files instead of PHP arrays.

    • Security

  • CipherBehavior pluginstars11 - Cipher your entities data with this behavior. Encryption is done at PHP level using CakePHP Security class.

    • Social

  • SocialShare pluginstars29 - Link generator for sharing content on social networks.

    • Asset Management

  • Less pluginstars18 - Less parser plugin for CakePHP.
  • MinifyHtml pluginstars19 - Compress HTML output.

    • Auditing / Logging

  • Version pluginstars51 - A plugin that facilitates versioned database entities.

    • Authentication and Authorization

  • CookieAuth pluginstars18 - A simple Cake 3 plugin to automatically authenticate users with Cookies.
  • HierAuth pluginstars6 - A CakePHP plugin for hierarchical, role based, simple authorization.
  • Muffin/OAuth2 pluginstars27 - OAuth2 authentication using the league/oauth2-client.
  • MultiTenant pluginstars36 - Easily build SaaS enabled web applications.
  • UserPermissions pluginstars18 - Allow groups of users or single users to view a specific page.

    • Dependency Injection

  • PipingBag pluginstars35 - Dependency injection container plugin that adds the ability to configure object instances and their dependencies before they are used, and to store them into a container class for easy access.

    • Environment

  • Settings pluginstars26 - A plugin to manage your settings via your database.

    • Filtering and Validation

  • Gourmet/Filters pluginstars10 - Extra dispatcher filters (maintenance, robots, ip, etc).
  • Gourmet/Validation pluginstars4 - Extra validation providers (Respect, IsoCodes, etc.) and rules.
  • HtmlPurifier pluginstars12 - Purifier Plugin Behavior that cleanses data before it is marshaled into the entity and/or before saving.

    • Libs

  • Capcakestars114 - Deploy CakePHP applications using Capistrano.
  • Chronosstars1.2k - A simple standalone DateTime API extension (successor of Carbon).
  • Composer Installersstars1.3k - A multi framework Composer library installer.
  • Composer/Packagist - A package and dependency manager.
  • Graphvizstars65 - A Graphviz library.
  • Rocketeerstars2.7k - PHP task runner and deployment package.
  • Travis CI - A continuous integration platform - de-facto standard for testing (GitHub) repos.

    • Notifications

  • Notifier pluginstars62 - A plugin that makes creating and reading notifications easy.

    • SEO

  • Sluggable pluginstars6 - A simple Cake3 plugin to slug fields and find records by slug.

    • Skeleton

  • Plugin Skeletonstars9 - A skeleton example to create a Cake3 plugin.

    • Templating

  • Address pluginstars0 - An address helper that outputs a marked up address.
  • Bootstrap pluginstars29 - A Bootstrap 3 plugin with support for LESS.
  • Chocolate pluginstars6 - Front-End framework FormHelper extensions.
  • Liquid pluginstars3 - A plugin to use the Liquid templating language for views.
  • SocialMeta pluginstars23 - Adds support for Facebook's OpenGraph and Twitter's Card meta tags.
  • VideoEmbed pluginstars4 - Helper for embedding YouTube, Vimeo and Dailymotion videos.

    • Testing

  • CakePHP CodeSniffer rulesstars222 - The official CakePHP CS rules.
  • Faker pluginstars17 - Fakerstars25.8k support for CakePHP fixtures.

    • Development Environment

  • CakePHP.gitignore - The .gitignore file proposals.

    • Help

  • CakePHP-FR.org - The french community website.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
Queue

  • CakeResque pluginstars162 - A plugin for Resque, a library for creating background jobs.

    • Development Environment

  • Puppet - A server automation framework and application.
  • Vagrant - A portable development environment utility.

    • CMS and applications built on CakePHP

  • QuickApps-CMSstars162 - Open source content management system.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2015
item.description:
Third Party APIs

  • Ratchet pluginstars50 - Brings the Ratchet websocket package to CakePHP.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2015
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • PersistRelatedData pluginstars11 - Behavior for persisting selected fields of related models.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2015
item.description:
CMS and applications built on CakePHP

  • CakeBlogstars5 - Open source blog software.

    • Debugging

  • Airbrake pluginstars3 A plugin to seamlessly integrate Airbrake with CakePHP for errors and exceptions.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 23rd - Mar 29th, 2015
item.description:
ORM / Database / Datamapping

  • Money pluginstars6 - Money data type for CakePHP entities using sebastianbergmann/moneystars740.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Mar 9th - Mar 15th, 2015
item.description:
File Manipulation

  • Proffer pluginstars121 - A customisable upload plugin with thumbnail generation.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 19th - Jan 25th, 2015
item.description:
Imagery

  • Imagine pluginstars140 - An image manipulation plugin and wrapper around Imaginestars4.1k.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jan 5th - Jan 11th, 2015
item.description:
CakePHP Websites

  • waltherlalk.com - A CakePHP related core dev blog.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Dec 22nd - Dec 28th, 2014
item.description:
Demo

  • Bookmarkrstars16 A bookmarking application built with the CRUD plugin.
  • Query Examplesstars57 Advanced query building examples.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Nov 24th - Nov 30th, 2014
item.description:
File Manipulation

  • FlyPie pluginstars35 - Abstract filesystem access using Flysystem.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Oct 27th - Nov 2nd, 2014
item.description:
CakePHP Websites

  • CakeDC - Articles around CakePHP.
  • josediazgonzalez.com - A mainly CakePHP related core dev blog.
  • mark-story.com - CakePHP lead dev blog.

item.title: FriendsOfCake/awesome-cakephp Jul 28th - Aug 3rd, 2014
item.description:
CakePHP Internals Reading

  • Top 10 (and more) core contributors - Give 'em a hand.

    • CakePHP Websites

  • jedistirfry.co.uk - A CakePHP related dev blog.

    • CakePHP Videos

  • CakePHP - Channel about CakePHP videos.
